name: Colonial Hot Buttered Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except rum and cream, along with nutmeg into the crockpot.
2. Add 2 quarts hot water to the crockpot.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Cover the pot and cook on LOW for 5 hours.
5. Add the rum and stir to blend thoroughly.
6. Serve from the pot in warm mugs, topped with a scoop of whipped cream and a dusting of nutmeg.
